titleStmt.title: SII 30.97: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 97. (A.R. No. 174 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District Veṅkaṭēsa Perumāḷ temple-on the east wall of the same shrine Rajēndra-Chōḻa I: year 9, day 38: 1021 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 90 sheep by Maṇḍai Naṅgaiyār, the senior queen (mūttaraisiyār) of Araiyaṉ Rājarājaṉ alias Vāṉavaṉ Brahmādhirājar for a perpetual lamp. Kaḻaṉiyār [land owners] and ūrār of Nilamaikūḍalūr of Nīrkuṇṟam, a northern hamlet of Sri Madhurāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, agreed to supply uḻakku ghee daily. Tiruvikrama Vaikundaṉ, an accountant of the temple figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumannivaḷara Irunila maṭantaiyum porccayap pāvaiyuñ cirttaniccelviyu n=taṉperunteviyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭutiyalūḻi yuḷiṭaituṟai nāṭun tuṭarvanaveli paṭar vanavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippā
kkaiyu naṇṇaṟ karumuruṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻat taraiyar tamuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cun=tara muṭiyu mintiranāra(va)mum teṇṭirai yiḻamaṇṭala mu
ḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷar muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palpaḻan=tivuñ ceruviṟ ciṉavilirupattorukālaraicu kaḷaikkaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cān=tima
ttivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟ tiruttaku muṭiyu māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesarivanmarāna śrīrājentracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu nāḷ 3 10 8 jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu kaḷattūrk koṭṭattut taṉiyū
r śrīmadhurān=takaccaturvvetimaṅkalattut tirumukkūṭalāḻvārkku Uṭaiyār perun=taṉattu Araiyaṉ Irājairājaṉāṉa vāṉavaṉ brahmādhirājar muttaraiciyār maṇṭai naṅkaiyār Ivvāḻvārkku vaitta tiruṉan=tā viḷakku 1 nukku vai
tta Āṭu toṇṇūṟum can=tirātittavaṟ kaiykoṇṭu Ivvāḻvār tirumuṟṟattu nicatam Uḻakku neyyaṭṭuvomāṉom Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai nirkkuṉṟattu nilaimaikūṭalūrk kaḻaṉiyomum Ūromum Ivai tevar karaṇattāṉ tiruvikkira
maṉ vaikun=taṉeṉ Ivaiyeṉṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 30.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
